sources.name: cwa_qpesums_radar_echo_grid
sources.data_name: 雷達資料-雷達整合回波資料
sources.license: 氣象資料開放平臺使用規範
sources.access_method: CWA file API with Authorization key: https://opendata.cwa.gov.tw/fileapi/v1/opendataapi/O-A0059-001?Authorization=${CWA_API_KEY}&downloadType=WEB&format=JSON
sources.native_format: JSON or XML; historyAPI listed in CWA metadata
sources.grid: 921 x 881 TWD67 lon/lat grid; 0.0125 degree resolution; lower-left origin at 115.0E, 18.0N; values ordered west-to-east then south-to-north; nodata=-99, outside/quality-removed=-999
sources.temporal_coverage: Current file API plus CWA historyAPI; historical range needs review
sources.field_description: Comma-separated scientific-notation floats. DateTime, StartPointLongitude, StartPointLatitude, GridResolution, GridDimensionX, GridDimensionY, Reflectivity=dBZ.
known_gaps: Confirm historyAPI availability and retention before training event splits.
sources.notes: Primary radar tensor candidate. A live JSON sample downloaded on 2026-07-06 parsed successfully with 811401 values matching 921*881.

sources.name: cwa_qpesums_hourly_qpe_grid
sources.data_name: 降雨估計資料-QPESUMS過去1小時定量降雨估計格點資料
sources.license: 氣象資料開放平臺使用規範
sources.access_method: CWA file API with Authorization key: https://opendata.cwa.gov.tw/fileapi/v1/opendataapi/O-B0045-001?Authorization=${CWA_API_KEY}&downloadType=WEB&format=JSON
sources.grid: 441 x 561 TWD67 lon/lat grid; 0.0125 degree resolution; lower-left origin at 118.0E, 20.0N; values ordered longitude-increasing then latitude-increasing; nodata=-1
sources.temporal_coverage: Current file API; historical range needs review
sources.field_description: Comma-separated scientific-notation floats. DateTime, StartPointLongitude, StartPointLatitude, GridResolution, GridDimensionX, GridDimensionY, Precipitation=mm.
known_gaps: Confirm historyAPI availability and retention before training event splits.
Use gauge validation before treating radar-estimated precipitation as ground truth.
sources.notes: Best candidate for flood-risk labels or rainfall accumulation features. A live JSON sample downloaded on 2026-07-06 parsed successfully with 247401 values matching 441*561.

sources.name: cwa_radar_image_products
sources.license: 氣象資料開放平臺使用規範
sources.access_method: CWA file API with Authorization key; JSON/XML metadata points to rendered image products
sources.grid: Rendered Taiwan radar echo image products; use for visualization, not the first training tensor source
sources.field_description: 雷達整合回波圖-臺灣地區
known_gaps: Image products may not preserve source grid values cleanly enough for model training.
Prefer O-A0059-001 for tensor conversion if sample parsing confirms the grid.
sources.notes: Visualization/reference source only until proven useful for numeric tensor conversion.

sources.name: cwa_rain_gauge_reference
sources.license: 氣象資料開放平臺使用規範
sources.access_method: CWA file API or REST datastore API with Authorization key
sources.native_format: JSON, XML, API, LINKEDAPI, or historyAPI
sources.crs: Coordinate fields are included; CRS must be checked against the official PDF
sources.grid: Point stations, not a radar grid
known_gaps: Reference source for gauge validation only; it is not a gridded radar tensor source.
sources.notes: Use as an auxiliary target/validation source for WRA gauges and gridded QPE.

review_notes: Official CWA observation dataset list was reviewed on 2026-07-06 through /webapi/formatType, /webapi/datasetPage/o, /webapi/datasetList/o, and /webapi/datasetMetadata/{dataid}.
CWA O-A0059-001 and O-B0045-001 JSON samples were downloaded and schema-inspected on 2026-07-06.
The selected radar candidate is intentionally not confirmed because history retention and multi-frame event collection still require review.
Keep CWA_API_KEY blank in git. Store real keys only in local env files and keep downloaded radar/QPE files under ignored data/external/ paths.
